storageStrategy.localDev: The Next.js API streams local files from localVideoPath.
storageStrategy.production: Upload videos to object storage/CDN and set NEXT_PUBLIC_VIDEO_BASE_URL. Keep only metadata and thumbnails in Vercel.
storageStrategy.recommended: Cloudflare R2 + public/custom domain, S3 + CloudFront, or Mux for transcoding and adaptive streaming.
